title: 4 PCS Squeegee Smoothing Tools,Plastic Squeegee With Felt Edge,Professional Small Wing Mirror Tool for Automotive Vinyl Packaging, Window Color and Wallpaper Installation
features: Packaging includes: You will receive 4 pcs mini squeegee in different colors, these vinyl wrap tools dimensions of 10x7 cm/ 3.94x2.76 inches.
Coating kit: Our small squeegee helps wrap protective or colored film on car windows. These wing mirror squeegee can protect what you want from scratches and impacts.

Durable and sturdy: Each of our car window squeegee is wear-resistant and will not damage the stickers during use. Each vinyl wrap squeegee has a plastic scraper edge and a felt edge for sensitive surfaces.
Widely used: This vinyl squeegee tool is widely used for pad pasting, wallpaper pasting, glass cleaning, vehicle snow removal, etc.
Perfect application: Our vinyl squeegee felt edge is perfect for all vinyl applications and will not scratch during installation.
description: Material: Plastic Color: Light Pink, Light Green, Deep Blue, and Big Red Size: 10x7 cm/ 3.94x2.76 inches Packing list: 4 pcs mini squeegee Structure Description: ﻿ Packaging includes: You will receive 4 pcs mini squeegee in different colors. These car vinyl wrap tools will help scrape off bubbles.Make your DIY projects a breeze with our small squeegee in beautiful,flexible and durable,smooth vinyl and squeegee out air bubbles with ease. High quality: Our wing mirror squeegee is made of high-quality plastic, sturdy and durable. The soft and smooth felt of these craft car window squeegee helps prevent scratches when applying vinyl. Durable and sturdy: Our vinyl wrap squeegee has high wear resistance, so you can reuse it. The soft felt of these vinyl squeegee tools help to quickly remove bubbles and minimize scratches. Easy to use: Our vinyl squeegee felt edge can be picked up and used immediately. You can easily grip the squeegee vinyl applicator comfortable handle and easily apply the material to larger surfaces without leaving any marks or scratches. Multi purpose scraper tool: Our squeegee for vinyl is perfect for automotive vinyl packaging, window coloring, window film installation, decals, wallpapers, adhesive vinyl, contact paper, and more.This plastic squeegee with felt edge is also great for removing pet hair and dust from upholstery
